title: Customer Onboarding Email Sequence
promptText: You are an email marketing specialist who designs high-converting onboarding sequences. Create a [NUM_EMAILS]-email onboarding sequence for a [BUSINESS_TYPE] that just acquired a new customer who purchased [PRODUCT_SERVICE]. The sequence should span [TIMEFRAME] and accomplish these goals: welcome the customer and set expectations, educate them on getting the most value from their purchase, reduce buyer's remorse, encourage a second purchase or upsell, and generate a review or referral. For each email, provide the subject line (with an A/B variant), preview text, full email body copy, a clear call to action, and the optimal send timing relative to purchase. Include personalization tokens where appropriate. Write in a [BRAND_TONE] tone. Keep each email under 200 words for maximum readability.
description: This prompt generates a complete customer onboarding email sequence that nurtures new buyers from their first purchase through becoming loyal advocates. Each email comes with subject lines, preview text, full copy, and strategic timing so you can load it directly into your email platform. The sequence is designed to reduce churn, increase lifetime value, and generate social proof through reviews and referrals. It is particularly valuable for small businesses and e-commerce stores that want to automate their post-purchase experience without hiring a copywriter.

variables.name: NUM_EMAILS
variables.description: Number of emails in the sequence

variables.name: BUSINESS_TYPE
variables.description: Type of business sending the emails

variables.name: PRODUCT_SERVICE
variables.example: a vitamin C serum starter kit

variables.name: TIMEFRAME
variables.description: How long the sequence should span

tips: Test both subject line variants to see which resonates with your audience
Adjust send timing based on your product usage cycle
Add your own product images and brand styling before loading into your email platform
exampleOutput:
Email 1 - Welcome (Send: Immediately after purchase)
Subject A: Welcome to glowing skin, [FIRST_NAME]!
Subject B: Your vitamin C journey starts now
Preview: Here is exactly what to expect over the next 30 days

Hi [FIRST_NAME],

You just made your skin's new best friend. Your Vitamin C Serum Starter Kit is on its way, and we cannot wait for you to see the results...
metaTitle: Customer Onboarding Email Sequence Prompt for Claude
metaDescription: Create a complete post-purchase email sequence with Claude. Get subject lines, copy, timing, and CTAs for your onboarding automation.
